Kansas IT That Actually Cares

We replace expensive, fragmented tech stacks with AI-built custom apps and White Glove IT support — disability-led, human-centered, and building toward a solar-powered future.

Chat with Us → See Our Services ↓
Four Ways We Serve You

Every Service Built Around a Real Problem

No bundled packages. No unnecessary upsells. Four focused service lines — each one built around a real problem we saw going unsolved.

💻
$199/mo

White Glove Managed IT

Real humans. SLA-backed. No offshore call centers. We know your setup before you call — and we're there when it matters.

Learn more →
🖥️
$149/mo per device

Hardware-as-a-Service (HaaS)

Refurbished enterprise hardware on subscription. Zero e-waste. We deploy, manage, and refresh every device on schedule.

Learn more →
🤖
From $3,000

AI Custom App Development

Replace your $800+/mo SaaS stack with a custom app you own outright — Kansas-hosted, no license fees ever.

Learn more →
🤝
$79/mo

Senior Technology Concierge

Scam-proof security setup, plain-English support, monthly check-ins. Designed for dignity — not afterthought tech support.

Learn more →
Why Clients Choose Us

What Makes Kecktech Different

There are a lot of IT companies. Here's what makes us different — and why it matters.

☀️

Solar-Powered Future

We're building toward a 25kW solar array and 100kWh battery bank for our Kansas facility — our 1–2 year goal. Every business decision we make today prioritizes sustainability and circular hardware.

♿

Disability-Led & ADA-First

Both founders live with physical disabilities. Accessibility isn't a checkbox at Kecktech — it's in the software, the support process, and every client interaction.

🔒

Your Data Stays in Kansas

We operate from Kansas and your data stays in Kansas — on our home infrastructure today, moving to our solar facility as we build it. We don't scan, sell, or monetize your data.

🧑

Real Humans. Real Accountability.

No ticket queues. No offshore call centers. No automated runaround. When you need us, a real person picks up — the same people, every time.

Ready for IT That Actually Works for You?

No long-term contracts. Transparent pricing. A team that treats every client like a neighbor.

Get a Free Assessment →

Solar-Powered. Sovereign Data.
AI-Built Apps. Disability-Led. Human-Centered.
